Core agent supports extra_tags to append additional tags to all submitted data. ADP does not support this. Classified as High Priority GA blocker in the audit. Open issue #1332.

ADP-only batching optimization key. Controls how long metrics/stats/traces encoders wait before flushing a partial payload. The core agent has no equivalent. Classified as ADP-only / fine as-is in Part 1 review.

Core agent allows selecting HTTP protocol version via forwarder_http_protocol. ADP does not support this. Classified as Follow Up in the audit. Open issue #1361.
ADP has no separate low-priority queue — all requests go through one buffer. Classified in the same investigation as forwarder_high_prio_buffer_size. Open issue #1362.

ADP uses concurrency to emulate workers. Possible mapping: forwarder_num_workers -> hyper pool size, forwarder_max_concurrent_requests -> max connections. Needs research. Classified as Investigation. Open issue #1363.
